items.name_en: L⊚℮w℮🌟 Small Satin Calfskin Puzzle Bag In Stock 👏
items.name_cn:
L⊚℮w℮🌟 Small Satin Calfskin Puzzle Bag In Stock 👏
A debut handbag from L 🆕*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This small version is made of satin calfskin with a detachable Loewe jacquard shoulder strap. This small Puzzle can hold, for example, a large wallet, all sizes of phones and sunglasses, and can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody*Carried by hand or with the top handle*Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap*Zipper closure with calfskin puller*External zip pocket on the back and an internal slip pocket*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:24*10.5*16CM
Model:262304
